Trace asserts hidden information without uncertainty markers: Leading the Ace of spades is the strongest available single. It can only be beaten by trumps (rank 7) or jokers, so it has a good chance of winning the trick. If it wins, player 0 keeps the lead and can next lead the weak 2 of spades, guaranteeing both cards are played and player 0 exits. This directly serves the finish-hand objective.
Partner consistency needs a public scenario tag before this conservative check applies.
Opponent consistency needs a public scenario tag before this conservative check applies.
Trace rationale is compatible with the selected action type.
finish_hand is compatible with playing from an endgame hand.
